## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Reproduction

Provide the command, config, or task involved.

## Expected behavior

Describe what should have happened.

## Actual behavior

Describe what happened instead.

## Artifacts

List any relevant run bundles, proof bundles, or fixture paths.
